title: Uno Cards
description: Uno cards made in minimalism do not heavily load the system and do not break the smoothing.
body:
Uno cards made in minimalism do not heavily load the system and do not break the smoothing.
For a fair game, the card in the hand is not visible.

# -------=renaming=-------
- Card 0 - paper - R0/Y0/B0/G0
- Card 1 - paper - R1/Y1/B1/G1
- Card 2 - paper - R2/Y2/B2/G2
- Card 3 - paper - R3/Y3/B3/G3
- Card 4 - paper - R4/Y4/B4/G4
- Card 5 - paper - R5/Y5/B5/G5
- Card 6 - paper - R6/Y6/B6/G6
- Card 7 - paper - R7/Y7/B7/G7
- Card 8 - paper - R8/Y8/B8/G8
- Card 9 - paper - R9/Y9/B9/G9
- Card +2 - paper - R22/Y22/B22/G22
- Card Reverse - paper - Rr/Yr/Br/Gr
- Card Skip - paper - Rb/Yb/Bb/Gb
- Wild Cart +4 - paper - D0
- Wild Cart - paper - D1
